content: API keys never enter the sandbox. Stored on host, injected by L7 proxy at network layer. Deny-by-default network policy. All outbound blocked unless explicitly allowed by policy YAML.

name: System vs user network policies
description: Baseline policies locked in UI (no revoke). Only user-approved draft policies revocable. SYSTEM_RULES set in active-policy-panel.tsx.

name: username-password-auth
description: Auth pattern: replaced token-based auth with username/password + bcrypt (12 rounds). isSetupRequired() checks credentials.json for admin_username/admin_password_hash. In-memory sessions Map holds session tokens set as httpOnly cookies. First-visit detected via GET /api/auth/status returning setupRequired:true.

title: Username/password auth replaces token auth
rationale: Token auth required SSH access to read server-generated token, unusable for non-technical users

description: Landlock LSM exec gap: policies/base.yaml filesystem_policy.read_only compiles to AccessFs::from_read(abi) only — READ_FILE + READ_DIR bits, NOT EXECUTE. Entries in read_only cannot be spawned. /opt/chromium-headless is in read_only with comment claiming 'needs read+exec so browser can spawn', but compiled ruleset drops EXECUTE and chrome-headless-shell hits EACCES at gateway startup. 'best_effort' compatibility only makes Landlock failures soft — does not add missing rights. Browser.enabled=true kills gateway inside every sandbox.
resolution: Add filesystem_policy.execute sibling list to crates/diffract-policy that compiles to AccessFs::from_read(abi) | AccessFs::Execute. Move /opt/chromium-headless from read_only to execute in policies/base.yaml. Tracked in seeds Diffraction-5589.

content: DIFFRACT_SKIP_AUTH env-gated auth bypass: set to 1 to skip all auth (demo mode). UI reads NEXT_PUBLIC_DIFFRACT_SKIP_AUTH at BUILD time (must be set before npm run build). API reads DIFFRACT_SKIP_AUTH at runtime (Environment= in systemd unit). Default is 1 (auth off) per user preference.
